title: Restaurant Manager
description:
Restaurant Manager – Roles & Responsibilities

Operations & Management

  • Oversee daily restaurant operations to ensure smooth and efficient service

  • Ensure compliance with food safety, hygiene, and MOM regulations

  • Manage opening and closing procedures, cash handling, and daily sales reports

  • Monitor inventory, order supplies, and control food & beverage costs

Staff Management

  • Recruit, train, schedule, and supervise restaurant staff

  • Ensure adequate manpower during peak and off-peak hours

  • Conduct staff performance evaluations and handle disciplinary matters

  • Motivate staff to deliver excellent customer service

Customer Service

  • Ensure high standards of customer service and dining experience

  • Handle customer complaints and feedback professionally

  • Build relationships with regular customers and maintain brand reputation

Financial & Sales Control

  • Prepare and manage budgets, cost control, and profit targets

  • Monitor sales performance and implement strategies to increase revenue

  • Ensure accurate billing, invoicing, and POS system usage

Quality & Compliance

  • Maintain consistent food quality, presentation, and service standards

  • Ensure compliance with NEA, SFA, and workplace safety regulations

  • Coordinate with suppliers and vendors for quality ingredients

Marketing & Business Development

  • Plan promotions, events, and special offers

  • Support digital marketing and customer loyalty initiatives

  • Analyze market trends and competitor activities

Reporting & Coordination

  • Report operational performance to management or owners

  • Coordinate with chefs, kitchen staff, and suppliers

  • Resolve operational issues efficiently

If you want, I can:

  • Make it shorter (for MOM job description)

  • Customize it for EP / S Pass justification

  • Tailor it for Indian restaurant / halal / buffet / fine dining

postedCompany.description:
Kavi Restaurant Indian Food in Singapore is a new stall that serves up delicious Indian cuisine. The restaurant is located in the heart of the city and is easily accessible by public transport. The restaurant has a warm and inviting atmosphere, with its traditional Indian decor and vibrant colors. The staff are friendly and attentive, and the menu is extensive, offering a wide variety of dishes from all over India.

The restaurant specializes in North Indian cuisine, with a focus on tandoori dishes. The tandoori dishes are cooked in a traditional clay oven, giving them a unique flavor and texture. The menu also includes a variety of curries, biryanis, and other Indian favorites. The restaurant also offers a selection of vegetarian dishes, as well as a variety of desserts.

The restaurant has a great selection of drinks, including Indian beers, wines, and spirits. The restaurant also offers a variety of cocktails and mocktails. The restaurant also has a great selection of Indian teas and coffees.

The restaurant is open for lunch and dinner, and the prices are reasonable. The restaurant also offers catering services for special occasions.

Overall, Kavi Restaurant Indian Food in Singapore is a great place to enjoy delicious Indian cuisine. The atmosphere is warm and inviting, the staff are friendly and attentive, and the menu is extensive. The restaurant is a great place to enjoy a meal with friends and family.
